title: నిజాయితీ అయిన కట్టెల కాడు
main_character: Rajesh, a 10-year-old boy with short black hair, brown eyes, and a bright smile, wearing a white shirt and blue shorts
setting: A small village surrounded by green forests, on a sunny afternoon with warm lighting

scenes.text: ఒక చిన్న గ్రామంలో రాజేష్ అనే పిల్లవాడు ఉండేవాడు. అతను ఎల్లప్పుడూ నిజాయితీగా ఉండేవాడు. అతని నిజాయితీ అందరికీ స్ఫూర్తినిచ్చేది.
scenes.image_prompt: Rajesh is walking towards the village, looking determined with a confident stride, his eyes shining with honesty, as the warm sunlight casts a glow on his face
scenes.text_te_en: Oka Chinna Graamanlo Raajesh Ane Pillavaadu Undevaadu. Atanu Ellappudu Nijaayitigaa Undevaadu. Atani Nijaayiti Andariki Sphurtinichchedi.
scenes.text_en: In a small village, there lived a boy named Rajesh. He was always honest. His honesty inspired everyone.

scenes.text: ఒక రోజు, రాజేష్ అడవిలో ఒక కట్టెను కనుగొన్నాడు. అది చాలా విలువైనది. కానీ అతను దానిని తనకు ఉంచుకోలేదు.
scenes.image_prompt: Rajesh is bending down to pick up the stick, his face filled with a mixture of excitement and responsibility, as the forest trees cast dappled shadows on the ground
scenes.text_te_en: Oka Roju, Raajesh Adavilo Oka Kattenu Kanugonnaadu. Adi Chaalaa Viluvainadi. Kaani Atanu Daanini Tanaku Unchukoledu.
scenes.text_en: One day, Rajesh found a valuable piece of wood in the forest. It was very precious. But he did not keep it for himself.

scenes.text: అతను దానిని గ్రామ పెద్దకు అప్పగించాడు. గ్రామ పెద్ద అతని నిజాయితీని అభినందించాడు.
scenes.image_prompt: Rajesh is handing the stick to the village elder, who is smiling and patting Rajesh on the back, as the sun casts a warm glow on the scene
scenes.text_te_en: Atanu Daanini Graama Peddaku Appaginchaadu. Graama Pedda Atani Nijaayitini Abhinandinchaadu.
scenes.text_en: He handed it over to the village elder. The village elder praised his honesty.

scenes.text: కొన్ని రోజుల తరువాత, రాజేష్ ఒక విలువైన బహుమతిని అందుకున్నాడు. అది అతని నిజాయితీకి బహుమతి.
scenes.image_prompt: Rajesh is holding the award, beaming with pride, as the village elder and other villagers applaud and cheer in the background, with a bright sun shining down
scenes.text_te_en: Konni Rojula Taruvaata, Raajesh Oka Viluvaina Bahumatini Andukunnaadu. Adi Atani Nijaayitiki Bahumati.
scenes.text_en: A few days later, Rajesh received a valuable gift. It was a reward for his honesty.

scenes.text: రాజేష్ నిజాయితీ అతనికి గెలుపును తెచ్చింది. అతను అందరి మన్ననలను పొందాడు.
scenes.image_prompt: Rajesh is standing in the center of the village, surrounded by his friends and family, who are all smiling and congratulating him, as the sun sets in the background
scenes.text_te_en: Raajesh Nijaayiti Ataniki Gelupunu Techchindi. Atanu Andari Mannanalanu Pondaadu.
scenes.text_en: Rajesh's honesty brought him success. He earned everyone's respect.
